instruction: Change the font to "Times New Roman" throughout the text.

steps.observation: The application is LibreOffice Writer, displaying a document named 'Dublin_Zoo_Intro.docx'. The visible panel is the main document editing window. Key UI elements include: the font dropdown showing 'Georgia' near the top center, the font size dropdown showing '15 pt' next to it, the toolbar with formatting options such as Bold, Italic, Underline, and alignment buttons above the document, the ruler above the text area, and the vertical scrollbar on the right. The document text is visible with some words underlined in red indicating spelling errors. A red marker is placed on the font dropdown menu labeled 'Georgia'.
steps.intent: The user intends to change the font of the text to 'Times New Roman' by first clicking the font dropdown menu to select a different font.
steps.action: The user clicked on the font dropdown menu labeled 'Georgia', as indicated by the red marker.
steps.result_observation: The font dropdown menu is now empty (no font name displayed), and the text in the document is highlighted in blue indicating it is selected. No font change has occurred yet.
steps.expected_result: After clicking the font dropdown, a list of available fonts should appear, allowing the user to select 'Times New Roman' to apply it to the selected text.

steps.observation: The application is LibreOffice Writer, editing a document named 'Dublin_Zoo_Intro.docx'. The current view shows the main editing window with the text area in the center. The font dropdown menu is located near the top left of the toolbar, currently empty with a dropdown list visible showing various font options such as 'Alef', 'Amiri', 'Arial', and 'Bahnschrift'. The document text is fully selected and highlighted in blue. Other visible UI elements include the standard toolbar with icons for saving, undo, redo, and formatting options like bold, italic, underline, and text alignment. The status bar at the bottom shows page information and language settings.
steps.intent: The user is trying to change the font of the selected text to 'Times New Roman'.
steps.action: The user clicked on the font dropdown menu (currently empty) as indicated by the red marker to open the list of available fonts.
steps.result_observation: The font dropdown menu expanded to show a list of available fonts, but no font has been selected yet. The selected text remains highlighted in blue, and the font name field remains empty.
steps.expected_result: After this action, the font dropdown menu should display the list of fonts, allowing the user to select 'Times New Roman'. Once selected, the font dropdown should show 'Times New Roman', and the selected text in the document should update to use the 'Times New Roman' font.

steps.observation: The application is LibreOffice Writer with the document 'Dublin_Zoo_Intro.docx' open. The current panel is the main document editing window. The font dropdown menu is expanded below the toolbar, showing a list of fonts including 'Arial', 'Bahnschrift', 'Calibri', and others. The text in the document is highlighted in blue, indicating it is selected. The font dropdown menu above the toolbar is currently empty. The red marker indicates a click on the font dropdown menu to open the list.
steps.intent: The user wants to change the font of the selected text to 'Times New Roman'.
steps.action: The user clicked on the font dropdown menu (indicated by the red marker) to select a font from the list.
steps.result_observation: The font dropdown menu now shows 'Times New Roman' as the selected font. However, the selected text in the document is no longer visible (the page is scrolled to a blank area), and the text highlight is still present but on an empty line, indicating the font change was applied but the view changed.
steps.expected_result: The font dropdown menu should display 'Times New Roman' as the selected font, and the selected text in the document should update to use the 'Times New Roman' font while remaining visible and highlighted.
